g.text: ▸ Role-based tenant isolation — zero cross-tenant data leakage
▸ JWT + Redis caching · Socket.IO real-time · Zoom API
▸ Decomposed monolithic codebase into clean modular MVC
▸ Improved reusability and separation of concerns across all layers
▸ Stripe-secured payments · AI-driven coupon engine · Redis cache
▸ Sub-50ms responses · Cloudinary media · Interactive dashboards
